text:
I used Claude to build a 20k subscriber faceless YouTube channel in 120 days.

December: 1.4k subscribers
January: 6.2k subscribers
February: 6.5k subscribers
March: 7k subscribers

Here's the 4-prompt system I used: https://t.co/6V0RFZZmbw
